_comment: Known dimension value issues that have been reviewed and accepted. The dimension sanity check suppresses warnings matching these entries. Remove an entry to start flagging it again.

dimension_sanity.reason: CDC SDH data and census immigration data use year ranges (e.g. '2018-2022', '2011-2015') as intentional encodings, not data errors.
Sub-state region codes (e.g. 'AR.3', 'CA.11') from surveillance manager transfer. These are valid surveillance regions, not standard FIPS/CBSA codes.
